.view-content.background: rgb(14, 22, 27) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(14, 22, 27) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(21, 34, 44) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(even).background: rgb(20, 31, 37) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(odd).background: rgb(14, 22, 27) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tr.background: rgb(12, 20, 23) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
